title: pholiurus pubescens
intro: Pholiurus pubescens, also known as the hairy spike grass, is a species of grass native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pholiurus pubescens include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
